title: Directory Tools
subtitle: Utilities for directory inspection and file system workflows
description: A collection of directory utilities designed to quickly retrieve information and support common file system workflows.
It provides simple tools for inspecting directories and working with structured file layouts.
features: List all files within a directory
Designed for integration into scripts and automation tools

howItWorks: The tool scans directories and retrieves file and folder information.
It can output simple lists or structured tree representations of directory contents.
apiStructure: Functions include file listing and directory tree generation.
Outputs are structured for easy use in scripts or other systems.

devLogs.title: Initial file listing tool
progressNotes: Created function to list all files in a directory
